name: Scrapling
description: High-performance Python web scraping library with anti-bot bypass, async support, and smart element auto-matching — faster than Playwright with no browser overhead.

skills.name: Anti-Bot Bypass
skills.description: Bypass bot detection systems including Cloudflare, DataDome, and browser fingerprinting

skills.name: Auto Element Matching
skills.description: Automatically re-match CSS selectors after page structure changes without manual updates

skills.name: Async Scraping
skills.description: Scrape multiple URLs concurrently with asyncio for high-throughput data collection

skills.name: No Browser Overhead
skills.description: Extract data without launching a browser — faster and lower memory than Playwright

skills.name: Structured Parsing
skills.description: Parse HTML into typed Python objects with CSS and XPath selector support
